title: selaginella coarctata
intro: Selaginella coarctata, also known as spiny shield fern or needle fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella and is native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella coarctata include its ability to improve respiratory health and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, although other herbal preparations such as capsules and tinctures may also be available.
